The '''Imperial Military Oversight Commission''' was a department of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]].

==History==
The department was formed from the [[Military Oversight Committee/Legends|Senate Military Oversight Committee]] and consisted of several Imperial officers and agents. Their task was to review data collected from Imperial excursions and battles and analyze any problems there may be within the Imperial Service. They would make their suggestions to commanding officers and even to the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] himself in order to improve the Imperial war machine.
